evals.name: basic-feature-commit
evals.prompt: I just finished adding a new ReportAggregation component with ReportAncestryCard.js, ReportDetailCard.js, and several image assets. I'm on branch dev/song. Please commit and create a PR.
evals.expected_output: Claude should generate a commit message like 'feat(report): add report aggregation cards and assets', commit the changes, push, and create a PR from dev/song to a version feature branch (e.g., 7.5.0-feature).

evals.name: fix-bug-commit
evals.prompt: I fixed a bug in the login authentication where the token wasn't refreshing properly. Fixed in Auth/TokenManager.js. On branch dev/fix-auth. Create a PR please.
evals.expected_output: Claude should generate commit message 'fix(auth): resolve token refresh issue', commit, push, and create PR.

evals.name: multiple-change-types
evals.prompt: I've made changes across the codebase: added a new API endpoint in Services/API.js, updated documentation in README.md, and refactored some utility functions in Utils/Helpers.js. Branch is dev/multi-changes. Submit a PR.
evals.expected_output: Claude should analyze all changes and either create multiple commits or choose the most significant type (likely 'feat' for the API endpoint) with appropriate scope.

evals.name: empty-changes
evals.prompt: Create a PR for my current branch. I think I made changes but I'm not sure.
evals.expected_output: Claude should check git status, find no changes, and inform the user gracefully instead of failing.

evals.name: style-only-changes
evals.prompt: I ran prettier on the whole project and fixed all formatting issues across 20 files. Branch dev/formatting. Need a PR.
evals.expected_output: Claude should generate 'style: apply code formatting across project' or similar, and create the PR.
